meta_title: For Students: portfolio building to Solve no version control (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Portfolio Building to Solve No Version Control
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to master version control and build a professional portfolio using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led guide.
content.answer_block: Version control isn't just for professionals; it is the safety net that turns amateur coding into a career-ready portfolio. By integrating Antigravity for project structuring and Claude Code for automated commits, you eliminate data loss while building a verifiable history of your growth that recruiters demand.
content.intro:
You’ve spent hours crafting the perfect function, only to overwrite it by mistake, leaving you staring at a blank screen and a broken feature. The anxiety of losing your progress is the silent killer of student developer ambition—a direct result of bypassing version control. It feels like you’re building a skyscraper on shifting sand.

But what if every line of code you wrote became a permanent, timestamped brick in your professional foundation? By mastering version control today, you transform your 'no version control' nightmare into a searchable, impressive portfolio that proves your expertise to future employers before you even graduate.

steps.title: Initialize Your Repository
steps.description: Establish a clean workspace to track your progress from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project structure with a clean README, .gitignore for node_modules, and a basic folder hierarchy.

steps.title: Automate Commit Hygiene
steps.description: Never lose progress again by committing small, logical changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup a pre-commit hook that validates code style before allowing a commit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'feat: initial project structure setup'

steps.title: Branching for Feature Exploration
steps.description: Safely experiment with new ideas without breaking your main project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new branch for the authentication feature to keep the main branch stable.

steps.title: Building the Portfolio History
steps.description: Use Claude Code to document your development journey automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a summary of the current branch progress to be used as a commit message.

steps.title: Merge and Deploy
steps.description: Successfully integrate your features and push to a remote host.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Merge the authentication branch into main and trigger a deployment script.
steps.claude_code_command: git checkout main && git merge feature/auth-module && git push origin main

pro_tips: Commit before you eat, sleep, or switch tasks to create a granular history.
Use descriptive commit prefixes like 'feat:', 'fix:', or 'docs:' to make your history readable.
Never force push to main; it destroys the integrity of your professional timeline.
Keep your commits atomic—one feature or fix per commit makes debugging 10x faster.
Regularly audit your repository history as if you were presenting it to a Senior Engineer.
content.next_steps: Once your repository is stable, deploy your project to a hosting service like Vercel or Netlify and link it directly from your LinkedIn profile.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student writing code; you are an engineer building a legacy. With Antigravity and Claude Code, you have the professional workflow to outpace your peers and land your dream role. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
